description: Create a GitLab CI pipeline using the debian:stable-slim Docker image. Define two stages: test and deploy. In the test stage add a test job that runs: echo 'allow-loopback-pinentry' >> ./ROOT/gpg_home_folder/gpg-agent.conf; chmod go-rwx ./ROOT/gpg_home_folder; apt-get update; apt-get install -y python3-gpg python3-venv libcairo2 libglib2.0-0 libpango1.0-0; python3 -m venv --system-site-packages env; source env/bin/activate; pip install wheel; pip install --upgrade pip; echo "cython<3" > /tmp/constraint.txt; PIP_CONSTRAINT=/tmp/constraint.txt pip install -r requirements.txt -r requirements-dev.txt; cd ROOT; python manage.py makemigrations --check --dry-run; python manage.py migrate; coverage run --branch --source . --omit '*/migrations/*','*/test*' manage.py test --parallel, and stores ROOT/.coverage as an artifact. In the deploy stage add a pages job that depends on test, runs: apt-get update; apt-get install -y python3-pip; pip3 install "coverage<5.0"; cd ROOT; coverage html --directory=../public; coverage report; and publishes the public/ directory as a GitLab Pages artifact.
